source.sourcePath: raw/sources/RA/04_제품별 인허가 진행 문서/07_Retrofit (HnX-R1)/★ FDA 510(k) - K252912/참고자료/참고 - 국내 기술문서/03. 기술문서 첨부자료/03 제품의 성능 및 안전을 확인하기 위한 자료/03 성능에 관한 자료/1. [G series] 성능시험성적서 (A-PTR-BLU).pdf

document.title: 성능시험성적서 (Performance Test Report)
authorityOrJurisdiction: Korea Good Manufacturing Practices of Medical Devices

sourceSummary.oneLine: Performance test report for HnX-R1 G series Digital Flat Panel X-ray Detector confirming detector performance settings with PASS results.
sourceSummary.officialUse: Supports domestic technical documentation by recording performance and safety-related test results for the medical image acquisition device HnX-R1 G series.
keyPoints: Document A-PTR-BLU Rev. 1 was issued on 2025.07.18 by H&abyz Co., Ltd.
The tested product is 의료영상획득장치 / Digital Flat Panel X-ray Detector, model HnX-R1, with G series reference models.
All summarized test items from CsI deposition thickness through trigger mode are reported as PASS.
IP range is stated as IP68 and follows IEC 60529.
The conclusion states that no abnormality was found in the performance setting values for HnX-R1 G series.

entities.name: Digital Flat Panel X-ray Detector
entities.evidence: Product name 의료영상획득장치 Digital Falt Panel X-ray Detector

entities.name: Laird Connectivity ST60-2230C
entities.evidence: The ST60-2230C-P/ST60-2230C-PU module is a dual band 2x2 802.11ac WLAN plus Bluetooth 5.1 dual mode adapter

concepts.evidence: CsI Deposition Thickness (CsI 증착 두께 확인)

concepts.name: MTF
concepts.evidence: MTF Phantom 영상 이미지를 획득하여 Calibration 적용 후 ‘Final Test’ 프로그램을 사용

concepts.name: DQE
concepts.evidence: DQE Bright 영상 이미지를 획득하여 Calibration 적용 후 ‘Final Test’ 프로그램을 사용

concepts.name: Trigger Mode
concepts.evidence: Line trigger 모드 정상동작; Auto trigger 모드 정상동작

evidence.claim: The document is Performance Test Report A-PTR-BLU Rev. 1 issued on 2025.07.18.
evidence.evidenceText: 성능시험성적서 (Performance Test Report) Doc No. A-PTR-BLU Rev. No. 1 Issue date 2025.07.18

evidence.claim: The report covers the medical image acquisition device HnX-R1 G series detector performance.
evidence.evidenceText: 본 시험 성적서는 의료영상획득장치 (HnX-R1)의 G series 디텍터 성능 확인을 위한 시험성적서이다.

evidence.claim: The manufacturer is H&abyz Co., Ltd.
evidence.evidenceText: Manufacturer H&abyz Co., Ltd.

evidence.claim: The product name is 의료영상획득장치 / Digital Flat Panel X-ray Detector.
evidence.evidenceText: Product name 의료영상획득장치 Digital Falt Panel X-ray Detector

evidence.claim: The G series reference models include G1417CW, G1417CWP, G1417FW, G1417FWP, G1717CW, G1717CWP, G1717FW, and G1717FWP.
evidence.evidenceText: (G series) G1417CW, G1417CWP, G1417FW, G1417FWP, G1717CW, G1717CWP, G1717FW, G1717FWP

evidence.claim: The 2/3G series reference models listed are A1717MCW, A1417MCW, and F1417MCW.
evidence.evidenceText: (2/3G series) A1717MCW, A1417MCW, F1417MCW

evidence.claim: Revision 1 was made due to a model name change.
evidence.evidenceText: 1 2025.07.18 Revision due to change in model name.

evidence.claim: The testing was performed on 2025.04.07 to 2025.04.08 at H&abyz in Yongin-si, Gyeonggi-do.
evidence.evidenceText: 시험일시: 2025.04.07~2025.04.08; 시험장소: ㈜에이치앤아비즈 (경기도 용인시 처인구 처인성로41-16 2동 1층일부)

evidence.claim: CsI deposition thickness testing passed for 300μm type and 500μm type panels.
evidence.evidenceText: 300μm type : 338.41μm 기준치 만족; 500μm type : 507.54μm 기준치 만족

evidence.claim: Sensor type verification passed for PIN-TFT and Flexible PIN-TFT specifications.
evidence.evidenceText: PIN-TFT (a-Si, IGZO) 사양서 확인 PASS; Flexible PIN-TFT (a-Si, IGZO) PASS

evidence.claim: Scintillator verification passed using CsI specification confirmation.
evidence.evidenceText: Scintillator 확인 CsI 사양서 확인 PASS

evidence.claim: Pixel pitch criterion is 140μm ± 10% and the test result was PASS.
evidence.evidenceText: Pixel pitch 140μm ± 10% 확인된 Pixel area를 Pixel number로 나눠 기준값 이내인지 확인. PASS

evidence.claim: MTF testing used RQA5 beam condition, 70kV, 40mAs, 21mm Al filter, SID 150cm, and passed.
evidence.evidenceText: MTF Phantom 영상 이미지를 획득하여 Calibration 적용 후 ‘Final Test’ 프로그램을 사용... RQA5 Beam condition, 70kV, 40mAs 21mm Al filter SID: 150cm PASS

evidence.claim: DQE testing used RQA5 beam condition, 70kV, 40mAs, 21mm Al filter, SID 150cm, and passed.
evidence.evidenceText: DQE Bright 영상 이미지를 획득하여 Calibration 적용 후 ‘Final Test’ 프로그램을 사용... RQA5 Beam condition, 70kV, 40mAs 21mm Al filter SID: 150cm PASS

evidence.claim: Sensitivity testing passed for all listed G series models.
evidence.evidenceText: Sensitivity Center 기준 110 LSB/uGy 이상... Center 기준 150 LSB/uGy 이상... PASS

evidence.claim: Energy range testing verified normal operation at 40kvp and 150kvp and passed.
evidence.evidenceText: Energy range 40kvp, 150kvp 정상동작 40kvp / 150kvp로 조사시 영상획득되는지 확인. PASS

evidence.claim: A/D conversion uses 16-bit ROIC data and converts to 14-bit by removing the lower 2 bits.
evidence.evidenceText: ROIC 보드의 A/D 변환 해상도는 16bit이며, 하위 2비트를 제거하여 14bit로 변환하여 사용하는 방식임.

evidence.claim: Wireless standard verification criterion is IEEE 802.11a/b/g/n/ac and passed.
evidence.evidenceText: Wireless standard IEEE 802.11a/b/g/n/ac Wifi 모듈 사양서 확인 PASS

evidence.claim: IP range is IP68 according to IEC 60529 and passed.
evidence.evidenceText: IP Range IP68 IEC 60529에 따른다 PASS

evidence.claim: Communication verification criterion is 1Giga-bit Ethernet and passed.
evidence.evidenceText: Communication 1Giga-bit Ethernet 사양서 확인 PASS

evidence.claim: Line trigger mode and auto trigger mode normal operation both passed.
evidence.evidenceText: Line trigger 모드 정상동작 ... PASS; Auto trigger 모드 정상동작 ... PASS

evidence.claim: The report conclusion states no abnormality in performance setting values for HnX-R1 G series.
evidence.evidenceText: 해당 시험 결과를 통해 의료영상획득장치 (모델명: HnX-R1, G series)의 성능 설정값에 이상 없음을 확인하였다.

evidence.claim: IP68 test report OT-252-RRD-035 for model G1417CW used IEC 60529:1989+A1:1999+A2:2013.
evidence.evidenceText: Report No.: OT-252-RRD-035... Model Name : G1417CW... Test Method Used : IEC 60529:1989+ A1:1999 + A2:2013

evidence.claim: IP68 test report OT-252-RRD-036 for model G1717CW used IEC 60529:1989+A1:1999+A2:2013.
evidence.evidenceText: Report No.: OT-252-RRD-036... Model Name : G1717CW... Test Method Used : IEC 60529:1989+ A1:1999 + A2:2013

evidence.claim: The KGMP certificate states H&abyz complies with Korea Good Manufacturing Practices of Medical Devices for the listed product group.
evidence.evidenceText: We hereby certify that the above manufacturer complies with Korea Good Manufacturing Practices of Medical Devices for the product group listed above

evidence.claim: KGMP recognition number is KCL-ABBA-15543.
evidence.evidenceText: 인정번호(No.) : KCL-ABBA-15543

reviewFlags.reason: The source metadata authoritySignal is MFDS/domestic, but the main report text is manufacturer-issued and does not explicitly identify MFDS as the issuing authority.
The source includes multiple embedded attachment documents with separate dates, revisions, and issuers; document-level metadata reflects the main Performance Test Report.
OCR/text extraction contains minor typographical artifacts such as 'Digital Falt Panel X-ray Detector' and 'DATASHHET'.
